stories.title: 美国富裕阶层让 AI 教孩子，传统教育被取代
stories.sourceTitle: Some of the nation’s rich are letting AI teach their kids
stories.summary: 美国一些富裕家庭放弃传统教育，转而让 AI 担任孩子的老师。尽管多数美国人不信任 AI，但富人阶层已开始实践。
stories.analysis: 这反映了 AI 在教育领域的极端分化应用，可能加速教育不平等。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Most Americans don't trust AI. It's proven that it doesn't know what safe toppings for pizza are. People don't even want to listen to AI music. But none of that matters for some of America's wealthy, who are turning to AI to teach their kids instead of traditi

stories.title: 谷歌广告让开国元勋拥抱 AI，引发观众反感
stories.sourceTitle: Infuriating Google commercial imagines the founding fathers embracing AI
stories.summary: Google Workspace 新广告设想美国开国元勋使用 Gemini 等工具完成《独立宣言》，被批评为尴尬且不合时宜。
stories.analysis: 广告创意翻车说明 AI 营销需要更谨慎的历史和情感考量。
stories.sourceExcerpt: "Group project, but make it 1776." That's how a new commercial for Google Workspace opens. And things only get cringier from there. The clip imagines what it would be like if the founding fathers turned to Google's collaboration tools and Gemini to help them d

stories.title: Amazon Mechanical Turk 将停止接纳新客户
stories.sourceTitle: Amazon will stop accepting new customers for Mechanical Turk
stories.summary: Amazon 宣布不再接受 Mechanical Turk 的新客户，这一众包平台可能走向终结。
stories.analysis: MTurk 的关闭标志着 AI 训练数据众包模式的衰落，转向更自动化方案。
stories.sourceExcerpt: These may be the last days of Amazon’s Mechanical Turk.

stories.title: 同人小说社区因 AI 陷入内战：反 AI 检测引发误伤
stories.sourceTitle: The fanfiction community is at war with AI — and itself
stories.summary: 同人圈发起运动清除使用生成式 AI 的作者，但检测方法不可靠，导致无辜作者被误伤。
stories.analysis: 创意社区对 AI 的排斥加剧，但缺乏有效技术手段可能激化内部矛盾。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Over the past week, a new fanworks movement has kicked off, with the aim to root out authors using generative AI. But the detection methods being implemented are questionable, and any fanfic writer could be caught in the crossfire. Broad distaste around the us

stories.title: Anthropic 宣布进军药物研发，发布 Claude Science 平台
stories.sourceTitle: Anthropic wants to develop its own drugs
stories.summary: Anthropic 发布面向科学家的 AI 工作台 Claude Science，整合工具与数据，并计划自主开发药物。
stories.analysis: Anthropic 从通用大模型向垂直科学领域延伸，展现 AI 制药的新路线。
stories.sourceExcerpt: At the event "The Briefing: AI for Science" earlier this week, Anthropic announced Claude Science, a new "AI workbench for scientists" that pulls fragmented tools and datasets into one environment, and generates figures and visuals. Anthropic, already dominati

stories.title: Midjourney 医疗扫描仪幕后揭秘，但功效仍存疑
stories.sourceTitle: A behind-the-scenes look at Midjourney’s medical scanner leaves many questions unanswered
stories.summary: Midjourney 发布其超声扫描仪的幕后视频，计划部署于水疗中心，但缺乏有效性的充分证据。
stories.analysis: 一家图像生成公司跨界医疗设备，技术验证不足可能引发信任危机。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Midjourney has shown more of its futuristic medical scanner. It still hasn't shown much proof it works. The AI startup, best known for generating images, released a behind-the-scenes video of its dunk-tank ultrasound scanner, which it plans to deploy in spas a

stories.title: OpenAI 提议向特朗普政府让渡 5% 所有权以缓解监管压力
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI floats giving Trump administration 5 percent cut of AI boom
stories.summary: 据金融时报，OpenAI 提出给予美国政府 5% 股权，意图缓解与特朗普政府的紧张关系并应对公众反弹。
stories.analysis: OpenAI 此举是重大战略让步，可能重塑 AI 行业的政企合作模式。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI has floated giving the US government a 5 percent ownership stake as a way of easing tensions with the Trump administration and blunting mounting public backlash against AI, according to the Financial Times. CEO Sam Altman argued that giving the public a

stories.title: Anthropic 长期搁置的 Fable 5 获准回归
stories.sourceTitle: Anthropic’s long-sidelined Fable 5 is greenlit to return
stories.summary: 经过与特朗普政府数周谈判，Anthropic 宣布将恢复 Claude Fable 5 的全球访问。
stories.analysis: Fable 5 的回归预示 AI 模型监管可能松动，但背后政治博弈值得关注。
stories.sourceExcerpt: After weeks of negotiating with the Trump administration, Anthropic is finally going to be able to bring Claude Fable 5 back online. In a post on X, Anthropic said it plans to begin restoring access Wednesday to users globally on Claude platforms, and that the

stories.title: Netflix 在真人秀中使用 AI 生成的 Gene Wilder 声音
stories.sourceTitle: Netflix is using an AI-generated Gene Wilder voice in its Willy Wonka reality show
stories.summary: Netflix 新节目《Wonka's The Golden Ticket》预告片中使用已故演员 Gene Wilder 的 AI 合成声音，引发争议。
stories.analysis: AI 复现已故名人声音的伦理边界再次被模糊，法律风险升高。
stories.sourceExcerpt: A new teaser trailer confirmed that Wonka's The Golden Ticket will premiere on Netflix on September 23rd, following its Squid Game reality show in the trend of creating real competitions based on fictional torture scenarios. While the sets seen in the trailer

stories.title: OpenAI 详解 GeneBench-Pro 的生命科学评测方法
stories.sourceTitle: Inside Genebench-Pro
stories.summary: OpenAI 披露 GeneBench-Pro 内部细节，该基准测试用于评估 AI 在基因组学等领域的性能。
stories.analysis: 专业基准的公开有助于建立 AI 在生命科学领域的可信度。

stories.title: OpenAI 发布 GeneBench-Pro，评估基因相关 AI 能力
stories.sourceTitle: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
stories.summary: OpenAI 推出 GeneBench-Pro，一个基于真实复杂数据集的新基准，测试 AI 在基因组学、生物学中的表现。
stories.analysis: 此举旨在巩固 OpenAI 在科学 AI 领域的地位，可能加速生命科学应用。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.

stories.title: OpenAI 通过 core dump 分析修复 18 年老 bug
stories.sourceTitle: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
stories.summary: OpenAI 工程师利用大规模 core dump 分析，定位并修复了一个持续 18 年的硬件和软件组合故障。
stories.analysis: AI 自身研发中使用大数据分析方法，展示了 AI 修复自身基础设施的能力。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.

stories.title: OpenAI 与 Broadcom 发布面向大模型推理的定制芯片 Jalapeño
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
stories.summary: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 联合推出专门为 LLM 推理优化的芯片 Jalapeño，旨在提升性能和效率。
stories.analysis: 定制芯片将降低大模型推理成本，改变 AI 基础设施竞争格局。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

stories.title: OpenAI 支持开源维护者，推出 Patch the Planet 计划
stories.sourceTitle: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
stories.summary: OpenAI 启动 Daybreak 倡议下的 Patch the Planet 项目，利用 AI 帮助开源维护者发现和修复漏洞。
stories.analysis: AI 赋能开源安全维护，可能改善整个软件供应链的可靠性。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.

stories.title: OpenAI 探索用 AI 帮助医生诊断儿童罕见遗传病
stories.sourceTitle: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
stories.summary: 研究人员使用 OpenAI 推理模型辅助诊断罕见病，在之前未解决的病例中识别出 18 例新诊断。
stories.analysis: AI 在罕见病诊断上的突破证明其辅助价值，但临床落地仍需验证。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.

stories.title: Google 在弗吉尼亚投资社区与能源项目，支撑数据中心扩张
stories.sourceTitle: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
stories.summary: Google 宣布在弗吉尼亚州的新社区投资，旨在创造本地就业并扩大能源可负担性，为数据中心扩张做准备。
stories.analysis: 大型科技公司通过地方投资换取 AI 基础设施的社区支持，是常见的博弈策略。
stories.sourceExcerpt: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.

stories.title: BBVA 与 OpenAI 合作，把 AI 放进银行核心流程
stories.sourceTitle: BBVA puts AI at the core of banking with OpenAI
stories.summary: 西班牙银行 BBVA 将 ChatGPT Enterprise 推广至 10 万员工，并与 OpenAI 合作加速 AI 驱动的银行业务转型。
stories.analysis: 传统银行全面拥抱 AI，标志着金融业从试用进入核心业务改造阶段。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Learn how BBVA scaled ChatGPT Enterprise to 100,000 employees and partnered with OpenAI to accelerate AI-powered banking transformation worldwide.

stories.title: 可通过 Oracle 云承诺使用 OpenAI 模型和 Codex
stories.sourceTitle: Access OpenAI models and Codex through your Oracle cloud commitment
stories.summary: OpenAI 模型和 Codex 现可通过 Oracle Cloud 访问，企业可用现有云承诺进行部署，并享受企业级安全治理。
stories.analysis: 多云渠道策略降低 OpenAI 企业用户接入门槛，与云厂商绑定加深。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.

stories.title: Anthropic 与三星讨论定制芯片合作
stories.sourceTitle: Anthropic is discussing a new custom chip with Samsung
stories.summary: 继 OpenAI 与 Broadcom 合作后，Anthropic 被曝正在与 Samsung 洽谈定制 AI 芯片。
stories.analysis: AI 公司纷纷自研芯片，表明对现有硬件成本与性能的不满，产业链垂直整合加速。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The news comes about a week after OpenAI announced its own custom AI chip in a partnership with Broadcom.

stories.title: OpenAI 在密歇根建设 Intelligence Age 基础设施
stories.sourceTitle: Building the infrastructure for the Intelligence Age in Michigan
stories.summary: OpenAI 在密歇根动工建设 1GW 数据中心，作为 Stargate 项目的一部分，以扩展 AI 基础设施并创造就业。
stories.analysis: 大规模数据中心建设是 AI 军备竞赛的关键，但能耗与地方关系需妥善处理。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI breaks ground on a 1GW data center project in Michigan as part of Stargate, building AI infrastructure to expand access, create jobs, and support communities.

stories.title: 波士顿儿童医院用 AI 帮助发现新的诊断线索
stories.sourceTitle: Boston Children’s uses AI to unlock new diagnoses
stories.summary: 波士顿儿童医院利用 OpenAI 技术改善患者护理、减轻运营负担，并成功诊断 40 多个罕见疾病病例。
stories.analysis: AI 在儿科罕见病诊断中的成功案例，增强其在医疗领域的应用信心。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Boston Children’s Hospital uses OpenAI technology to improve patient care, reduce operational burden, and help diagnose more than 40 rare disease cases.

stories.title: 三菱日联金融集团与 OpenAI 推进 AI 原生组织转型
stories.sourceTitle: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
stories.summary: MUFG 使用 ChatGPT Enterprise 构建 AI-native 组织，改进工作流并推出新的 AI 金融服务。
stories.analysis: 大型金融机构向 AI-native 转型，预示传统组织形态将发生根本变化。
stories.sourceExcerpt: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.

stories.title: Virgin Atlantic 用 Codex 加快软件交付
stories.sourceTitle: How Virgin Atlantic ships faster with Codex
stories.summary: 维珍航空使用 Codex 在固定假日截止日期前重构移动应用，达到近乎完全的单元测试覆盖和零 P1 缺陷。
stories.analysis: Codex 在严格时间线下的成功应用，证明了 AI 辅助开发的可靠性。
stories.sourceExcerpt: How Virgin Atlantic used Codex to ship its revamped mobile app on a fixed holiday travel deadline, reaching near-total unit test coverage and zero P1 defects.

stories.title: AdventHealth 用 OpenAI 推进医疗护理服务
stories.sourceTitle: AdventHealth advances whole-person care with OpenAI
stories.summary: AdventHealth 使用 ChatGPT for Healthcare 简化工作流程、减少行政负担，将更多时间还给患者护理。
stories.analysis: 医疗 AI 从辅助诊断扩展到流程优化，整体效率提升潜力巨大。
stories.sourceExcerpt: AdventHealth is using ChatGPT for Healthcare to streamline workflows, reduce administrative burden, and return more time to patient care.

stories.title: Ramp 工程师用 Codex 加速代码审查
stories.sourceTitle: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex
stories.summary: Ramp 的工程师使用 Codex with GPT-5.5 进行代码审查，将获得实质性反馈的时间从几小时缩短到几分钟。
stories.analysis: AI 代码审查显著提升开发效率，可能成为软件开发标准流程。
stories.sourceExcerpt: How Ramp engineers use Codex with GPT-5.5 to review code and ship improvements, allowing them to get substantive feedback in minutes instead of hours.

stories.title: 被 OpenAI 收购后，uv 工具创始人反思 AI 编程：一行代码都没读就发布
stories.sourceTitle: “我一行代码都没读就发布了”，被OpenAI收购后，uv工具创始人开始反思AI编程
stories.summary: 被 OpenAI 收购的 uv 工具创始人反思 AI 编程实践，坦言自己一行代码都没读就发布了产品。
stories.analysis: AI 编程速度与质量控制的矛盾凸显，开发者需警惕过度依赖。
stories.sourceExcerpt: 点击查看原文>

stories.title: OpenSquilla 0.5.0 Preview 发布，多模型集成登顶 DRACO 双榜，对比包含 Fable 5
stories.sourceTitle: OpenSquilla发布0.5.0 Preview：多模型集成登顶DRACO双榜，对比名单中出现最新旗舰Fable 5
stories.summary: OpenSquilla 发布 0.5.0 Preview 版本，集成多个模型并登上 DRACO 双榜榜首，基准对比中出现了最新的 Fable 5。
stories.analysis: 国内模型通过集成策略在榜单上表现突出，但与顶级模型的差距仍需观察。
stories.sourceExcerpt: 少烧钱、真交付

stories.title: Qwen3Guard：Token 流实时安全防护，Qwen 系列首个安全护栏模型
stories.sourceTitle: Qwen3Guard: Real-time Safety for Your Token Stream
stories.summary: Qwen 团队发布 Qwen3Guard，基于 Qwen3 微调的安全分类模型，用于实时拦截 Token 流中的不安全内容。
stories.analysis: 安全护栏模型的推出是 AI 治理的重要进展，但实际效果需在应用中检验。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Tech Report GitHub Hugging Face ModelScope DISCORD Introduction We are excited to introduce Qwen3Guard, the first safety guardrail model in the Qwen family. Built upon the powerful Qwen3 foundation models and fine-tuned specifically for safety classificatoin,
